report.summary: Community growth cycle v9: identified ton-blockchain-guide and crypto-options-trading-guide as net-new pages since v8; drafted 7-post TON Blockchain Twitter thread (900M Telegram users angle), crypto options trading tweet (defined risk / yield on holdings), April 15 tax reminder tweet; Discord/Telegram announcement with special TON/Telegram native callout; Thursday newsletter section with TON as lead story and Pectra Degen Corner; created 2 SVG social cards saved to /public/.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (7 posts): TON Blockchain — hook on 900M Telegram users with built-in crypto wallet; Telegram founders' origin story; what TON actually does (payments, TON Space, mini apps, NFT usernames); ecosystem numbers (top-10 market cap, gaming via Notcoin/Hamster Kombat/Catizen); why distribution advantage is unique vs. other L1s; risk framing (fate tied to Telegram, passive vs. active users); CTA to /learn/ton-blockchain-guide
Tweet: Crypto Options Trading — defined risk / yield on holdings / downside protection angle; calls puts covered calls; CTA to /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide
Tweet: April 15 tax reminder — 31 days countdown; Q4 deadline just passed; every swap/NFT/DeFi yield taxable; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026

Discord/Telegram announcement: TON guide + options guide with direct URLs; special Easter egg for Telegram users: '*(Special note for this channel: yes, we're announcing a TON guide in a Telegram group. We see you. 👀)*'

Newsletter section (Thursday send): BTC market pulse ($71K + Pectra countdown); TON Blockchain as lead story (900M users hook); Options Trading Guide; April 15 tax reminder callout; Degen Corner on Pectra EIP-7702 smart wallet unlock; 3 subject line variants provided

Posting schedule: Sunday PM carry-forwards (BTC Reserve thread + Discord v8 announce) → Monday Tokenized Treasuries tweet + TON/Options Discord announce → Tuesday GENIUS Act tweet + TON thread → Wednesday Sonic + Meme Launchpads + Options tweet → Thursday Newsletter → Friday Tax reminder tweet

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-ton-blockchain-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: TON diamond logo (large right-side decoration with orbit rings and network dots), 900M+ / TOP 10 / TON SPACE stat pills, TON BLOCKCHAIN GUIDE headline with cyan-to-blue gradient on 'TON', 'The crypto network hiding inside Telegram' subtitle, Telegram Native badge bottom-right, dark #080d1c background. Saved to /public/social-ton-blockchain-guide.svg

social-crypto-options-trading-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: live call option payoff diagram (BTC $60K–$80K range, $70K strike, colored profit/loss zones, breakeven dot), Covered Calls / Protective Puts / Delta-Gamma feature pills below chart, 6-bullet feature list on left panel, CRYPTO OPTIONS TRADING headline with purple gradient, dark background. Saved to /public/social-crypto-options-trading-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 16 — GSC organic signals imminent (day 14–21 window); first impressions data could arrive today
Net-new pages for v9 sourced from publish-v4: /learn/ton-blockchain-guide and /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide — first time covered in any community cycle

TON scored 88/100: Telegram's 900M user distribution advantage is the strongest untapped on-ramp narrative in crypto; query clusters include 'ton blockchain', 'toncoin explained', 'telegram crypto wallet', 'ton space wallet', 'ton vs solana'; Telegram channel cross-promotion is uniquely on-brand

Crypto Options Trading scored 83/100: evergreen educational content with growing search intent as crypto derivatives market matures; query clusters include 'crypto options trading', 'bitcoin options explained', 'covered call crypto', 'how to trade eth options'
April 15 tax reminder elevated to 89/100 this cycle — Q4 deadline passed today (Mar 15), 31-day countdown to main US deadline creates urgency-driven search spike
Pectra Degen Corner maintained at 90/100 — now ~25 days from mainnet; EIP-7702 smart wallet angle is differentiated from generic upgrade coverage
Posting schedule: Sunday PM carry-forwards → Monday TON+Options Discord/Telegram announce → Tuesday TON thread → Wednesday Options tweet → Thursday Newsletter → Friday Tax reminder
